sum: Adds Dynaheir as a recruitable NPC companion in Shadows of Amn and Throne of Bhaal.
no: Dynaheir BG2EE allows players to decide which of the Rashemaar companions should be available during the Shadows of Amn and Throne of Bhaal campaigns - Minsc or Dynaheir. The decision is made on a new area, to which you need to bring Minsc - there is a new door next to his cage. Free him and let him see what happened to his friend.

conflicts.reason: Choose one Dynaheir in BG2. WeiDU auto-skips bg1npcsoa version when standalone detected.

co.tp2n: Dynaheir for Baldur's Gate 2: EE - Player-Initiated Dialogues
